warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Staff Only: Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The role-play scenario was not outlined, nor were any issues identified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the role-play scenario was detailed, or the problems were identified, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both the role-play scenario was clearly explained, and the problems were precisely identified.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A comprehensive understanding of the role-play scenario was shown, along with a precise definition of the problems.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No different options were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more alternative solutions were offered, but their advantages and/or disadvantages were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two alternative solutions were presented, with an analysis of their respective benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several alternative solutions were provided, each with a thorough analysis of multiple advantages and disadvantages.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution was offered, but a strategy for putting it into practice was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible solution was presented, along with a well-thought-out plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution was developed, complete with an implementation strategy and an identification of the required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas:
criteria.description: The participant's grasp of key subject areas related to international business, such as fundamental global principles, organizational structure and leadership, market strategies, financial management, effective communication (including cultural and linguistic considerations), ethical practices, tax laws and governmental policies, foreign currency exchange, global travel logistics, and professional growth.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No relevant subject areas were showcased.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two relevant subject areas were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three relevant subject areas were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Four or more relevant subject areas were demonstrated.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear to be ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent structure.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a logical progression.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation maintained a logical flow, and all points were clearly articulated and structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified presentation abilities were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified presentation abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, direct eye contact, or clear vocal delivery) were exhibited.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified presentation abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, direct eye contact, or clear vocal delivery) were exhibited.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified presentation abilities were consistently demonstrated, significantly enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to provide answers to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant did not fully address the questions posed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant provided complete answers to all questions.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing thorough answers to all questions.
